VICTORY_CONDITIONS.VICTORY_CONDITIONS_DESC: Village Aspirations are optional objectives you can complete on your terms while you manage your village. Tracking the ones you're interested in will add them to your list of quests.
VICTORY_CONDITIONS.VC_NO_ASPIRATION_GOAL: Relax and play on my own!
VICTORY_CONDITIONS.VC_NO_ASPIRATION_DESC: For players who wish to set their own goals and see where the journey takes them.
VICTORY_CONDITIONS.VC_KINGDOM_FORTRESS_DESC: For experienced players who want to dive into the military side of the game.
VICTORY_CONDITIONS.VC_CAPITAL_DESC: For players who want to build a balanced community with the three Estates.
VICTORY_CONDITIONS.VC_LABOR_COMMUNE_DESC: For beginners who want to play with taxation and labour workforces.
VICTORY_CONDITIONS.VC_PROSPEROUS_PRIORY_DESC: For players who want to focus on a monastery and trading.
VICTORY_CONDITIONS.ASPIRATION_WILL_FAIL_IN_X: Aspiration failing in {1} because of a Restriction.
VICTORY_CONDITIONS.VC_WARNING_FAILING: Aspiration failing because of a Restriction
